title: Oru Kili Oru Kili Lyrics Leelai
stanzas:
Oru Kili Oru Kili Song Lyrics #Leelai
#ShreyaGhosal

Oru kili oru kili
siru kili
unnai thodave anumadhi

oru thuli oru thuli
siru thuli
vazhigiradhe vizhi vazhi

Unakkul naan vaazhum
vivaram naan kandu
viyakkiren viyakkiren

Enakku naan alla
unakku than
endru unargiren
Nizhal ena thodargiren

oru kili oru kili
siru kili
unnai thodave anumathi

oru thuli oru thuli
siru thuli
vazhigirathe vizhi vazhi

Vizhiyalla, viral ithu
oru madalthaan
varainthathu
uyir alla uyil ithu
unakkuthaan uriyathu

Imaigalin idaiyil nee
imaipathai naan thavirkkiren.
vizhigalin vazhiyil nee
urakkam vanthal thadukkiren

Kadhalthaan ennaalum
oru vaarthaikul
varathathu

Kaalangal sendralumthan
vaanam pol vizhathathu

oru kili oru kili
Siru kili
unnai thodave anumathi
oru thuli oru thuli
siru thuli
vazhigirathe vizhi vazhi

Dhoorathu megathai
thurathi chellum
paravai pole.
thogaiye unnai
naan thediye
vanthen inge

Poigai pol
kidanthaval
paarvai yennum
kal yerinthai.
kalanginen
un kaiyil valaginen
ennai indre

Thozhiye un thegam
ilam thendralthan
thodathatho

Thozhane un kaigal
thoda naanamthaan
vidathatho

oru kili oru kili
Siru kili unnai
thodave anumathi
oru thuli oru thuli
siru thuli
vazhigirathe vizhi vazhi

Unakkul naan vaazhum
vivaram naan kandu
viyakkiren viyakkiren

Enakku naan alla
unakkuthaan
endru unargiren
Nizhal ena thodargiren

oru kili oru kili
Siru kili unnai
thodave anumathi
oru thuli oru thuli
siru thuli
vazhigirathe vizhi vazhi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kili Oru Kili, the lyrics express a deep sense of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Leelai. The song serves as a romantic backdrop, highlighting the beauty of connection and affection. With its soothing melody, it evokes feelings of warmth and tenderness, making it ideal for intimate moments. The collaboration between the singers adds a rich layer of emotion, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kili Oru Kili from Leelai beautifully captures the essence of romance with its enchanting melodies. The unique collaboration between Satish Chakravarthy and the melodious Shreya Ghoshal creates an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into this soothing duet that perfectly complements the film's romantic narrative.
stanzaMeanings: A small bird, a small bird, I seek your permission to touch you.
A small drop, a small drop, a small drop flows from the eyes.
I live within you, I reveal the details, I reveal them.
I realize that I am not me, but only for you.
I extend like a shadow.
A small bird, a small bird, I seek your permission to touch you.
A small drop, a small drop, a small drop flows from the eyes.
This is not just an eye, this finger is a sign of life, not just a sleep for you.
In the midst of illusions, I will avoid the deception. If you come in my sight, I will stop you.
Even if I have to say something, it won't come out.
Time will pass, just like the sky will change its appearance.
A small bird, a small bird, I seek your permission to touch you. A small drop, a small drop, a small drop flows from the eyes.
Like a distant cloud, I have come searching for you like a bird. I have come here looking for you.
Like a pond, your gaze has captured me. I am lost in your hands.
My friend, your touch is like a gentle breeze.
My friend, your hands are my pride.
A small bird, a small bird, I seek your permission to touch you. A small drop, a small drop, a small drop flows from the eyes.
I live within you, I reveal the details, I reveal them.
I realize that I am not me, but only for you.
I extend like a shadow.
